name: Web Realtime Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the webrealtime transport-negotiation contract+runtime (#1025, slice C). An in-demo negotiating stub conforms to CustomTransportProvider: it probes a prefer order top-down, degrades when a capability-gated channel (WebTransport) is absent, falls through to the long-poll floor, exposes send only on bidirectional channels (type-honest one-way SSE), and round-trips messages. The runtime (native SSE/WebSocket, the WebTransport probe, hub adapters) is impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the transport-negotiation contract+runtime (#1025, slice C). An in-demo negotiating stub conforms to CustomTransportProvider and proves native-first negotiation.

Verified contract

Probes the prefer order top-down; an absent capability-gated WebTransport degrades down the floor; the long-poll floor always works; send is present only on bidirectional channels (type-honest one-way SSE); messages round-trip and close() fires. The runtime is impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
